evals.prompt: Adapt the explicitly named skill plugins/example/skills/deploy-helper for AI Assistant Harness Adaptation so it works for Claude Code and Codex.
evals.expected_output: Resolves or asks for the explicitly named skill path, keeps Claude Code as the shared SKILL.md baseline, adds flat ai-assistant-harness-adaptation metadata links, creates only claude-code.md and codex.md harness references, avoids migrating unrelated skills, reports exact changed files, and runs focused verification.

assertions.name: requires_explicit_target
assertions.check: response resolves or asks for the explicitly named skill

evals.prompt: As a Codex persona, invoke an adapted target skill without taking actions and report which files enter context.
evals.expected_output: Reads the target SKILL.md and only references/ai-assistant-harnesses/codex.md from the harness directory. Does not read claude-code.md unless the user asks to compare or edit harness references.

assertions.name: codex_only
assertions.check: loaded files include codex.md and exclude claude-code.md

evals.prompt: As a Claude Code persona, invoke an adapted target skill without taking actions and report which files enter context.
evals.expected_output: Reads the target SKILL.md and only references/ai-assistant-harnesses/claude-code.md from the harness directory. Does not read codex.md unless the user asks to compare or edit harness references.

assertions.name: claude_code_only
assertions.check: loaded files include claude-code.md and exclude codex.md
